{
  "incremental_revenue_range": "$80,000 - $140,000 per month",
  "incremental_gross_profit_range": "$32,000 - $56,000 per month",
  "monthly_net_benefit_range": "$2,000 - $26,000 per month",
  "payback_period_range_months": "7 - 90 months",
  "decision": "APPROVE_WITH_CONDITIONS",
  "reasoning_summary": "The AI engine could lift revenue by 4‑7%, generating $32k‑$56k gross profit monthly. After subtracting $30k operating costs, net benefit ranges from $2k to $26k. Payback of the $180k implementation cost would take 7 months in the best case but up to 90 months in the worst case, exceeding the 12‑month requirement. Approval is advised only with conditions to mitigate downside risk.",
  "key_assumptions": [
    "Revenue uplift applies to current monthly revenue of $2M.",
    "Gross margin remains constant at 40% for incremental revenue.",
    "Monthly AI infrastructure and maintenance costs are fixed at $22k and $8k respectively.",
    "Implementation cost is a one‑time expense incurred before go‑live.",
    "Payback calculation uses monthly net benefit after go‑live, ignoring the 3‑month implementation period."
  ]
}

parsed_output.reasoning_summary: The AI engine could lift revenue by 4‑7%, generating $32k‑$56k gross profit monthly. After subtracting $30k operating costs, net benefit ranges from $2k to $26k. Payback of the $180k implementation cost would take 7 months in the best case but up to 90 months in the worst case, exceeding the 12‑month requirement. Approval is advised only with conditions to mitigate downside risk.
key_assumptions: Revenue uplift applies to current monthly revenue of $2M.
Gross margin remains constant at 40% for incremental revenue.
Monthly AI infrastructure and maintenance costs are fixed at $22k and $8k respectively.
Implementation cost is a one‑time expense incurred before go‑live.
Payback calculation uses monthly net benefit after go‑live, ignoring the 3‑month implementation period.
